distill_output_instruction: Write all distilled replacements in English. Preserve technical terms (URLs, file paths, commands, version numbers, migration IDs) verbatim — do not translate them.

triage.review_instruction: Review {table_path}, then run `/memory-apply` to execute it. The apply step creates a full backup before touching anything.

distill.action_prompt: Apply, skip, or edit the proposal?
distill.already_tight_message: This file is already tight (≤3 sentences, already forward-looking). No distillation needed.
distill.applied_message: Distilled body written. Final size: {size} bytes.
distill.cannot_compress_message: Cannot fit all load-bearing content into 3 sentences without loss. Refusing to lie with a bad distillation.

errors.memory_dir_not_found: Could not locate the auto-memory directory. Please supply the absolute path.
errors.table_not_found: Triage table not found at {path}. Run `/memory-triage` first, or pass the table path as an argument.
errors.backup_failed: Backup creation failed. STOPPING. No files were modified.
errors.locale_missing: Locale '{lang}' not found. Falling back to English. Submit a translation PR at https://github.com/marcelopaniza/mempenny/tree/main/locales
